www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 51 --

What Happens When You Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 51 --

Scaling Your Business
What you must understand is
that in order to scale your
business, the old business must
die.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 51 --

When you change everything
about your business, you must
understand that before you are
granted the success….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 51 --

YOU WILL ENCOUNTER
FAILURE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 51 --

I would like to share with you
the normal pitfalls you are about
to encounter… that WILL feel
like failure.
Scaling Your Business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 51 --

I like to call these
Growing Pains
Scaling Your Business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 51 --

1. CEO holding on too tightly
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 51 --

1. CEO holding on too tightly
2. Wrong People
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 51 --

1. CEO holding on too tightly
2. Wrong People
3. Focus on Marketing/Sales not
Retention
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 51 --

1. CEO holding on too tightly
2. Wrong People
3. Focus on Marketing/Sales not
Retention
4. Not tracking Metrics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 51 --

These are not ALL of the
growing pains you will
encounter, just the ones I see
most common.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 51 --

CEO holding on too tightly
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 51 --

CEO holding on too tightly
• You hire, but don’t delegate
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 51 --

CEO holding on too tightly
• You hire, but don’t delegate
• You delegate tasks, not
decision making power
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 51 --

CEO holding on too tightly
• You hire, but don’t delegate
• You delegate tasks, not
decision making power
• You hire and feel more
pressure, not less
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 51 --

You are ultimately
bottlenecking the growth of
your company out of fear.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 51 --

1.) All CEO’s are scared to let go
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 51 --

1.) All CEO’s are scared to let go
2.) Let go anyway
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 51 --

1.) All CEO’s are scared to let go
2.) Let go anyway
3.) You will only get f**ked ⅕ times
:)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 51 --

The entire point of hiring people
is to RELIEVE you.
IT makes no sense to put the
team on your back and carry
them
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 51 --

Why the heck are you paying
them to make you more
stressed?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 51 --

Stop freezing out of fear and
LET GOOOOOO
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 51 --

You have the Wrong People
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 51 --

When you build a machine to do
one thing and only that, you
cannot ask the machine to do a
new thing
	without new parts or
repairs
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 51 --

You cannot expect that your
entire team will be the team who
scales your business with you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 51 --

This is especially relevant to
small businesses.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 51 --

When you decide to scale your
business, you may upset some of
the team you currently have.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 51 --

“All we care about now is money”
“When is it enough?”
“It’s not like it used to be”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 51 --

That is okay.
That is normal.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 51 --

You will do your best to
transparently manage and explain
all changes
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 51 --

But at the end of the day, you
often need some new teammates
to get to a new level.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 51 --

Especially if you have not yet
instilled a strong culture around
change.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 51 --

You must not be afraid to let
people go, hire from the outside,
or start fresh.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 51 --

Short term, it may be painful, but
it avoids a lingering pain in the
long run.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 51 --

Focus on Marketing Not Retention
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 51 --

A mistake of most first time
business owners is their lack of
attention to retention and instead
on marketing.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 37 of 51 --

Why is this detrimental?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 51 --

It will ruin your culture
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 51 --

It will ruin your culture
It will discourage your team
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 40 of 51 --

It will ruin your culture
It will discourage your team
It will ultimately kill your
reputation
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 41 of 51 --

As you are growing and scaling,
you cannot forget to take care of
the people.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 42 of 51 --

Your members are your cultural
cofounders.
OVERDELIVER.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 43 of 51 --

Not Tracking Metrics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 44 of 51 --

As you are growing your business
it is easy to become distracted
with people problems instead of
number problems
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 45 of 51 --

However, this is when you MUST
develop the habit of knowing and
understanding your metrics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 46 of 51 --

Scaling will cost you money and
time before it gives you money
and time, therefore you need to
be consistently tracking all
business metrics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 51 --

You must delegate responsibility
of each metric to the appropriate
teammate, and educate them on
the metric.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 48 of 51 --

If you want to get out of a certain
role, everything must be
accounted for including hitting
the metrics.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 49 of 51 --

Not only that, but allowing your
team to account for different
metrics is appreciated by all
because of the TRANSPARENCY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 50 of 51 --

#GrowOrDie
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 51 of 51 --
